_comment: plan-review-hub configuration. All fields have built-in defaults. Override via env vars or this file.

_env_vars.PLAN_HUB_SOURCE: Plan source: auto | generic | openspec (default: auto)
_env_vars.PLAN_HUB_THEME: Path to a CSS theme file (default: assets/themes/default.css)
_env_vars.PLAN_HUB_TOKEN: Optional shared-secret token; if set, requests must supply ?token=<value>
